<div class="wp-block-column is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow" style="flex-basis:66.66%">
<h2 class="wp-block-heading" id="headline-58-49">OUR PRIVATE, EXCLUSIVE AND LUXURY ALCOHOL & DRUG REHAB CENTER IN UTAH</h2>



<p class="has-text-align-left">Cirque Lodge is where hope, healing, and recovery are offered in the peaceful serenity of the mountains. Cirque Lodge is located on majestic Mount Timpanogas, in the Sundance area of the Rocky Mountains of Utah. Towering above the Lodge is the awe-inspiring Cascade Cirque, a natural glacier amphitheater. The prefix amphi means “on both sides.” On the other side of the mountain from our Lodge is our Studio facility, situated at the mouth of Provo Canyon.</p>



<p>Our inpatient treatment program offers state-of-the-art rehab facilities (Cirque Lodge & Cirque Lodge Studio), combined with mental health services in the perfect location for healing. We provide the latest in therapeutic techniques, therapies, and invigorating outdoor activities, allowing you to reconnect with your true self.</p>



<p>Our recovery model provides an individualized treatment plan for each client. We combine the traditional 12-step model with cognitive-behavioral therapy (CBT), group therapy, and experiential therapies to provide the most effective treatment possible.</p>



<p>Our holistic approach supports long-term success in your personal growth and recovery journey. We will empower and equip you with the knowledge, tools, and support to maintain a happy, healthy life.</p>
</div>

<div class="wp-block-column is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow">
<h2 class="wp-block-heading" id="rehab-dual-diagnosis">REHAB & DUAL DIAGNOSIS</h2>



<p>At Cirque Lodge, we offer integrated programs that treat both mental health conditions and substance use disorders. We provide holistic treatment to work with the ‘whole client’, and our programs are personalized to meet their individual requirements.</p>



<div class="wp-block-buttons is-layout-flex wp-block-buttons-is-layout-flex">
<div class="wp-block-button"><a class="wp-block-button__link wp-element-button" href="/treatment/dual-diagnosis/">More about treatment</a></div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>



<div class="wp-block-tb-tab tb__tab-panel" role="tabpanel">
<div class="wp-block-columns is-layout-flex wp-container-core-columns-is-layout-9d6595d7 wp-block-columns-is-layout-flex">

    <source srcset="https://www.cirquelodge.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/12/Cognitive-Therapy-scaled-1-600x0-c-default.webp" media="(min-width: 1024px)"/>
    <source srcset="https://www.cirquelodge.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/12/Cognitive-Therapy-scaled-1-400x0-c-default.webp" media="(min-width: 767px)" />

</picture></div>



<div class="wp-block-column is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow">
<h2 class="wp-block-heading" id="trauma-therapy">TRAUMA THERAPY</h2>



<p>Cirque Lodge emphasizes the importance of treating substance abuse and trauma together, as trauma often underlies addiction. Without addressing both, recovery is difficult—unresolved trauma can lead to relapse, while addiction can hinder emotional healing. Through an integrated approach, including trauma-informed therapy and addiction treatment, Cirque Lodge helps individuals heal both mind and body for lasting recovery.</p>



<h2 class="wp-block-heading">Therapeutic Modalities<br>How we treat Trauma</h2>



<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li role="tab" aria-selected="false">Cognitive Behavioral Therapy (CBT)</li>



<li role="tab" aria-selected="false">Emotional Freedom Therapy (EFT)</li>



<li role="tab" aria-selected="false">Acceptance and Commitment Therapy (ACT)</li>



<li role="tab" aria-selected="false">Mindfulness-based Cognitive Therapy (MBCT)</li>



<li role="tab" aria-selected="false">Dialectical Behavioral Therapy (DBT)</li>



<li role="tab" aria-selected="false">Rational Emotive Therapy (RET)</li>



<li role="tab" aria-selected="false">Eye Movement Desensitization and Reprocessing (EMDR)</li>



<li role="tab" aria-selected="false">Brain Spotting</li>



<li role="tab" aria-selected="false">Sociometry</li>



<li role="tab" aria-selected="false">Psychodrama</li>



<li role="tab" aria-selected="false">Gestalt Therapy</li>



<li role="tab" aria-selected="false">Psychodynamic</li>



<li role="tab" aria-selected="false">Internal Family Systems</li>



<li role="tab" aria-selected="false">Narrative Exposure Therapy</li>
</ul>



<div class="wp-block-buttons is-layout-flex wp-block-buttons-is-layout-flex">
<div class="wp-block-button"><a class="wp-block-button__link wp-element-button" href="/treatment/cognitive-therapy/">More about treatment</a></div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>

</picture></div>



<div class="wp-block-column is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow">
<h2 class="wp-block-heading" id="experiential-therapy">Experiential Therapy</h2>



<p>Experiential therapy allows you to explore and reinforce the skills you learn through mindful meditation and through exhilarating physical activities. It offers the chance to revive your mind, body, and soul as you partake in enriching experiences; empowering you to further explore and support the skills you learn through varying activities.</p>



<div class="wp-block-buttons is-layout-flex wp-block-buttons-is-layout-flex">

<h2 class="wp-block-heading" id="mountain-luxury-residential-treatment-home-away-from-home">MOUNTAIN LUXURY RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT: HOME AWAY FROM HOME</h2>



<p>We understand that addiction is not a choice, and we firmly believe that rehabilitation should not be a punishment. Our facilities are magnificently appointed, with exceptional bedrooms, gorgeous bathrooms, and stunning views of the mountains. We’re proud to have created an environment conducive to holistic healing.</p>



<p>Three well-balanced meals are prepared for residents each day. We use high-quality and fresh ingredients in all our food. When possible, we source our food locally. The kitchen is always full of healthy snacks, fruit, and vegetables that you may take as you please. We are also sensitive to the dietary needs of our clients and can prepare individualized meals on request.</p>



<p>Cirque Lodge offers residential rehabilitation programs for drug and alcohol abuse as well as other addiction recovery services.</p>

<section class="section section--info-boxes section--old-align-center section--default " >

				
			<header class="section__header">
					<h2 class="section__headline" id="seeking-addiction-recovery-in-utah">SEEKING ADDICTION RECOVERY IN UTAH </h2>
							<div class="section__description">If you or a loved one is struggling with an alcohol abuse or substance use disorder, we are here to support you.<br />
<br />
We are dedicated to providing each client and their family with the most significant and professional level of care, enabling them to work towards a successful recovery. Our focus is on delivering the highest quality of compassionate care combined with clinical excellence in a trusting community.<br />
<br />
Our remote natural surroundings provide unique opportunities to develop new skills and find inspiration for a healthy recovery.</div>
			</header>
			
    <div class="section__inner">      
<div class="info-boxes info-boxes--background">
      <div class="info-boxes__item">
      <div class="info-boxes__icon">
        
      </div>
      <div class="info-boxes__content">
                  <h3 class="info-boxes__title" id="world-class-accommodations">World-Class Accommodations</h3>
                <div class="info-boxes__description">
          <p>Both the Lodge and the Studio offer world-class accommodations with breathtaking views of the surrounding mountains.</p>
<p>Cirque Lodge hosts a range of state-of-the-art facilities and stunning accommodations. We believe Cirque Lodge is the finest drug and alcohol treatment facility in any country.</p>
<p>We have a private gated entrance that speaks to our privacy not only for our residents but for their family and friends. We believe it is the most comprehensive treatment experience to be found anywhere in alcohol or drug treatment.</p>

        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
      <div class="info-boxes__item">
      <div class="info-boxes__icon">
        
      </div>
      <div class="info-boxes__content">
                  <h3 class="info-boxes__title" id="what-we-offer">What We Offer</h3>
                <div class="info-boxes__description">
          <ul>
<li>An indoor and outdoor horse arena where we offer equine therapy in all seasons.</li>
<li>An art therapy room with the most modern equipment in the treatment industry.</li>
<li>A recording studio where you can use music to help your recovery.</li>
<li>12 acres of private land containing hybrid rose gardens, a greenhouse and organic vegetable gardens.</li>
<li>State-of-the-art fitness center, full-court indoor basketball court, indoor and outdoor pickleball courts,  1/2 mile 12-step walking path, sand volleyball court, 12-hole chipping and putting green and outdoor movie theater.</li>
<li>A space for massages and a hair salon.</li>
</ul>

        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
      <div class="info-boxes__item">
      <div class="info-boxes__icon">
        
      </div>
      <div class="info-boxes__content">
                  <h3 class="info-boxes__title" id="advanced-indoor-ropes">Advanced Indoor Ropes</h3>
                <div class="info-boxes__description">
          <p>One of our most impressive activities is our ropes course and climbing area.</p>
<p>Our adventure ropes course is located in our state-of-the-art Studio facility and is in a 17,000ft sound stage with 50ft ceilings. The course helps you step outside your comfort zone, overcome your fears, and learn to believe in yourself. You also develop important team-building skills and explore trust and communication with others.</p>
<p>Our high ropes course has an incredible number of different elements. The main course is a series of thirty-nine climbing steps and challenges that take you from one giant tripod to the other.</p>

        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
    </div>
</section>

<h2 class="wp-block-heading" id="personalized-treatment">PERSONALIZED TREATMENT</h2>



<p>If you’re struggling with addiction to alcohol or drugs, we can help. We’ll give you the support you need and the space to grow. Our focus is on providing the highest quality of compassionate care combined with clinical excellence. We use the most modern and effective addiction treatment and the shared knowledge of our highly qualified staff.</p>



<p>We are licensed by the State of Utah and accredited by the Joint Commission for the Accreditation of Healthcare Organization (JCAHO).</p>

<section class="section section--align-center content-wrapper">



    


<header class="section__header">
  

<h2 class="wp-block-heading has-text-align-center" id="dual-diagnosis-luxury-rehab">DUAL-DIAGNOSIS LUXURY REHAB</h2>




</header>


<p class="has-text-align-center">Addiction is often the result of co-occurring disorders. At Cirque Lodge, our inpatient rehab facility treatment utilizes dual diagnosis treatment to assess the cause and nature of your addiction. We offer integrated programs that include dual diagnosis as part of our drug addiction treatment as we evaluate both issues with a focus on recovery.<br><br>As a rehab center we provide holistic treatment to improve the quality of life for our residents. Our programs are designed and led by our professional medical team, master-level therapists, and other experts.<br><br>Throughout your stay, you can take advantage of twenty-four-hour medical advice and care.<br><br>We support patients from all over the USA. For example, from: <a href="https://www.cirquelodge.com/facilities/drug-rehab-center-salt-lake-city-ut/">Salt Lake City</a>, <a href="https://www.cirquelodge.com/facilities/drug-rehab-center-provo-ut/">Provo</a>.</p>




</section>

<section class="section section--faq section--old-align-center section--default " >

				
			<header class="section__header">
					<h2 class="section__headline" id="faqs-about-drug-alcohol-rehab">FAQs About Drug & Alcohol Rehab</h2>
					</header>
			
    <div class="section__inner">    <div class="faq faq--chevron">
  
  
    
    
    
  <div class="faq__items" data-style="default">
          <div class="faq__item">
        <button class="faq__question">
          What Is a Luxury Drug Rehab Center?
        </button>
        <div class="faq__answer">
          <p>A Luxury Drug Rehab Center is a type of treatment facility that offers a higher standard of comfort, care, and amenities compared to traditional rehab facilities. Cirque Lodge is a perfect example of a exclusive rehab center. Our facility provides comprehensive treatment in an environment that combines the beauty of nature with the comfort of upscale accommodations.</p>

        </div>
      </div>
                      <div class="faq__item">
        <button class="faq__question">
          What Sets Cirque Lodge Apart From Other Rehab Centers?
        </button>
        <div class="faq__answer">
          <p>Cirque Lodge is set in the beautiful and serene landscapes of Sundance and Orem, Utah. We offer an individualized treatment approach with a low staff-to-patient ratio, shared and private rooms, gourmet meals, and numerous recreational activities. At our exceptional rehab facilities, we use a combination of evidence-based therapies, experiential therapy, and 12-step programs.</p>

        </div>
      </div>
                      <div class="faq__item">
        <button class="faq__question">
          How Long Does Treatment Usually Last at a Rehab Center?
        </button>
        <div class="faq__answer">
          <p>The length of treatment at a rehab center varies depending on each individual’s needs and progress in recovery. Generally, a stay at a rehab center can range from 30 to 90 days, but some clients choose to stay longer.</p>

        </div>
      </div>
                      <div class="faq__item">
        <button class="faq__question">
          How Much Does Exclusive Rehab Cost?
        </button>
        <div class="faq__answer">
          <p>The cost of treatment at exclusive rehab centers like Cirque Lodge varies depending on the specific program and length of stay. We recommend contacting our admissions team directly for more specific information regarding cost.</p>

        </div>
      </div>
                      <div class="faq__item">
        <button class="faq__question">
          Does Insurance Cover Rehab?
        </button>
        <div class="faq__answer">
          <p>Cirque Lodge works with most insurance providers to make rehab affordable. The extent to which treatment is covered will depend on the specifics of your individual insurance plan. Our team can assist with insurance verification to help you understand the details of your coverage.</p>

        </div>
      </div>
                      <div class="faq__item">
        <button class="faq__question">
          Is Privacy Guaranteed at a Rehab Center?
        </button>
        <div class="faq__answer">
          <p>At Cirque Lodge, we uphold the highest standards of privacy and confidentiality. All treatment records are kept strictly confidential for our resdients, and we offer private accommodations in a safe, secure environment. We are committed to maintaining the privacy of all our residents.</p>

        </div>
      </div>
                      <div class="faq__item">
        <button class="faq__question">
          Is There Aftercare Support Available After Leaving Cirque Lodge?
        </button>
        <div class="faq__answer">
          <p>At Cirque Lodge, we believe that aftercare is a crucial part of the recovery journey. We provide comprehensive aftercare plans following exceptional rehab treatment, which can include referrals to outpatient treatment programs, help with finding sober living arrangements, and alumni support groups</p>

        </div>
      </div>
                      <div class="faq__item">
        <button class="faq__question">
          What Is the Success Rate of People Who Go To Rehab?
        </button>
        <div class="faq__answer">
          <p>Success rates for rehab can vary widely depending on a multitude of factors such as the type of factors such as the type of addiction, personal circumstances, the quality of the program, and the measurement of success.  According to the National Institute on Drug Abuse, about 40% to 60% of those who go through addiction treatment may relapse, which underscores that addiction is a chronic disease, similar to hypertension or asthma. However, this doesn’t mean that treatment is unsuccessful.  Many individuals who go through treatment experience significant improvements in their quality of life, even if they relapse at some point. Continued aftercare and support can greatly improve long-term success.</p>

        </div>
      </div>
                  </div>

</div>

<script id='script-67bdc57539a1a-js' type='text/javascript'>
var option_button_pdf = {
    source:'https://www.cirquelodge.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/02/Brochure-for-Website-compressed-1-1-1-1.pdf',
    webgl:true,
};

function loadDFlipAssets() {
    // Add CSS file
    const link = document.createElement("link");
    link.rel = "stylesheet";
    link.href = "https://www.cirquelodge.com/wp-content/themes/bv-theme/assets/dist/css/components/dflip.min.css";
    document.head.appendChild(link);

    // Add JS file
    const script = document.createElement("script");
    script.src = "https://www.cirquelodge.com/wp-content/themes/bv-theme/assets/dist/js/components/dflip.min.js";
    script.addEventListener('load', () => {
        setTimeout(() => {
            document.querySelector('.dear-flip a').classList.remove('loading');
            document.querySelector('.dear-flip a').click();
        }, 2500);
    });
    document.body.appendChild(script);
}
if (document.querySelector('.dear-flip a'))
document.querySelector('.dear-flip a').addEventListener('click', (e) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    document.querySelector('.dear-flip a').setAttribute('href', '#');
    document.querySelector('.dear-flip a').classList.add('loading');
    document.querySelector('.dear-flip a').classList.add('_df_button');
    document.querySelector('.dear-flip a').setAttribute('id', 'button_pdf')
    loadDFlipAssets();
}, { once: true })

window.addEventListener('load', () => {
    if (window.location.hash.startsWith('#button_pdf')) {
        const link = document.querySelector('.dear-flip a');
        if (link) {
            link.setAttribute('href', '#');
            link.classList.add('loading');
            link.classList.add('_df_button');
            link.setAttribute('id', 'button_pdf');
            loadDFlipAssets();
        }
    }
});
</script>

              window.wpformsDispatchEvent = function (el, ev, custom) {
                    var e = document.createEvent(custom ? "CustomEvent" : "HTMLEvents");
                    custom ? e.initCustomEvent(ev, true, true, false) : e.initEvent(ev, true, true);
                    el.dispatchEvent(e);
                };
            window.wpformsRecaptchaV3Execute = function ( callback ) {
                        grecaptcha.execute( "6Ld8Y2MkAAAAALW3CQjUYKaAdSWBcHhNKg8G_k-b", { action: "wpforms" } ).then( function ( token ) {
                            Array.prototype.forEach.call( document.getElementsByName( "wpforms[recaptcha]" ), function ( el ) {
                                el.value = token;
                            } );
                            if ( typeof callback === "function" ) {
                                return callback();
                            }
                        } );
                    }
                    grecaptcha.ready( function () {
                        wpformsDispatchEvent( document, "wpformsRecaptchaLoaded", true );
                    } );
          
        })
        document.body.appendChild(script);
        }, 6500);
    }, { once: true})

CirqueLodge: Private & Luxury Drug Rehab in Utah

 Menu 
 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 

 

 Mountain Luxury Drug Rehab Treatment in Utah for Lasting Recovery
 

 
Cirque Lodge is a trauma-informed substance use disorder treatment center that specializes in co-occurring mental health issues. Situated in the serene Rocky Mountains of Utah, we offer an enriching rehabilitation experience in a tranquil setting.

 

 
 

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 

 
 Chef Chad Sarno Joins Cirque Lodge Culinary Team 

 
Cirque Lodge is excited to welcome internationally acclaimed culinary innovator Chef Chad Sarno as our new chef. With over 25 years of expertise in plant-forward, wellness-centered cuisine, he will lead our culinary program with whole-ingredient menus that nourish the body, support recovery, and enhance overall well-being, perfectly reflecting Cirque Lodge’s commitment to world-class care and a truly restorative dining experience.

 

 Learn More 
 

 
 

 

 

 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

OUR PRIVATE, EXCLUSIVE AND LUXURY ALCOHOL & DRUG REHAB CENTER IN UTAH

Cirque Lodge is where hope, healing, and recovery are offered in the peaceful serenity of the mountains. Cirque Lodge is located on majestic Mount Timpanogas, in the Sundance area of the Rocky Mountains of Utah. Towering above the Lodge is the awe-inspiring Cascade Cirque, a natural glacier amphitheater. The prefix amphi means “on both sides.” On the other side of the mountain from our Lodge is our Studio facility, situated at the mouth of Provo Canyon.

Our inpatient treatment program offers state-of-the-art rehab facilities (Cirque Lodge & Cirque Lodge Studio), combined with mental health services in the perfect location for healing. We provide the latest in therapeutic techniques, therapies, and invigorating outdoor activities, allowing you to reconnect with your true self.

Our recovery model provides an individualized treatment plan for each client. We combine the traditional 12-step model with cognitive-behavioral therapy (CBT), group therapy, and experiential therapies to provide the most effective treatment possible.

Our holistic approach supports long-term success in your personal growth and recovery journey. We will empower and equip you with the knowledge, tools, and support to maintain a happy, healthy life.

 
 
 
 

 
 
LIVE Camera Streaming

 
Click for Full Screen

 
 
 

 

 

 

 
 

 
 

 

 

 
Cirque Lodge Sundance

 

 

 

 

 
 

 
 

 

 

 
Cirque Lodge Studio

 

 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 

 “ 
 Cirque Lodge was an amazing and truly special experience to me. The staff is unparalleled in helping you find recovery. 
 ” 

 “ 
 I certainly didn’t arrive at Cirque Lodge on a winning streak, but with the help of the clinical team and staff, I’m walking out a completely new person with gratitude. 
 ” 

 “ 
 Nothing but an attitude of gratitude for Cirque Lodge. The staff and programming are phenomenal. 
 ” 

 “ 
 I was going to let my disease kill me, and Cirque quite literally saved my life. Follow the program, do what they suggest. 
 ” 

 “ 
 Cirque Lodge was amazing! They truly changed my life – brought me back to life! Loved my experience! 
 ” 

 “ 
 When I felt lost, Cirque Lodge picked me up and loved me until I could love myself again. 
 ” 

 “ 
 I came here broken spiritually, mentally, emotionally and physically. I’m leaving with a new chance at life. 
 ” 

 “ 
 Cirque Lodge allowed me to share my story openly, knowing that I was surrounded by others who understood the struggles of addiction and were striving for a future filled with hope, happiness, and sobriety. 
 ” 

 “ 
 Cirque Lodge provides a great environment and a caring staff to support your work towards recovery. 
 ” 

 “ 
 I walked in to Cirque Lodge with so much fear and anger. I am leaving with happiness, confidence, and strength. I am proud of myself and success. 
 ” 

 “ 
 The counselors helped me dig deep and feel emotions I have never felt before. Thank you for helping me find myself and my sobriety. 
 ” 

 “ 
 This has become a very special place in my heart. I have made many friends and hope to continue the road of recovery after I leave here. 
 ” 

 “ 
 I found my time in the mountains of Sundance at Cirque Lodge incredibly powerful and transformative to my life. I leave with a lifelong commitment to self-awareness, spiritual growth, and recovery. 
 ” 

 “ 
 This is my second treatment facility and hopefully my last. Cirque Lodge is an exceptional facility. I would highly recommend Cirque Lodge to anyone in need of help getting their life in balance. 
 ” 

 “ 
 Cirque Lodge saved my life and gave me reason to hope for a brighter future. Beautiful, spiritual, surroundings and excellent staff, and all the tools I need for long term sobriety were found here. 
 ” 

 “ 
 My experience at Cirque Lodge was much more than I expected it to be. I came here broken and confused; I am leaving here, back in touch with my Higher Power. 
 ” 

 “ 
 Once I contacted Cirque Lodge, you made me feel that I was coming to the right place. The mountains made me feel at home. Cirque Lodge has given me a chance to heal. 
 ” 

 “ 
 I really believe that Cirque Lodge is the best facility for treatment. I am very hopeful for my future and I have already been recommending Cirque Lodge to others in need. 
 ” 

 “ 
 Because of Cirque Lodge I am alive, thriving and happy for the first time in many years. Cirque Lodge not only saved my life, but reinvented my family structure as well. 
 ” 

 “ 
 Cirque Lodge gave me a new lease on life. The experience allowed me to pull my soul out of the dark abyss that was my drug addiction. I am deeply grateful to everyone who played a role in my recovery. 
 ” 

 “ 
 My experience at Cirque Lodge was excellent. I believe that I have the tools to stay sober. I know that Cirque Lodge has provided me with an excellent start to sobriety and a happy life. 
 ” 

 “ 
 I will never forget the experience I had at Cirque Lodge. My life has been forever changed. Thank you for giving me a second chance at life. It’s the greatest gift I will ever receive. 
 ” 

 “ 
 My experience at Cirque Lodge has helped change my whole outlook on life. It helped me get in touch with parts of my spirit that I did not know existed. 
 ” 

 “ 
 Cirque Lodge was a gift from God. I went to other treatment centers and I felt pushed against a wall. This place saved my life. 
 ” 

 “ 
 I was extremely nervous upon arriving at Cirque Lodge. Everyone made me feel welcome. I would recommend Cirque to anyone who wants to recover from their addictions. 
 ” 

 “ 
 My experience at Cirque Lodge was magical. I never thought in thirty days that my whole life would turn around. Instead of pushing life away, I now embrace it. Thank you Cirque Lodge. 
 ” 

 “ 
 My treatment at Cirque out measured anything I could have ever imagined. The balance of lectures, experiential therapy, and workshops worked very well for me. 
 ” 

 “ 
 I have felt really welcome here and the staff has been very understanding. The location of this place is beautiful. This has to be one of the best treatment facilities available, if not the best. 
 ” 

 “ 
 Cirque Lodge is truly well rounded with an excellent rehabilitation program and atmosphere. Having been to another first class facility, I can confidently say that Cirque Lodge has it all. 
 ” 

 “ 
 Detox saved my body. Cirque Lodge gave me back my life. Martin Luther King Jr. said 'I have been to the mountain and I have a dream.' I came to Cirque Lodge with nothing but my life, but I am leaving with dreams. 
 ” 

 “ 
 I was hesitant to come to rehab. This past 30 days has turned my life around 100%. I could not have done it without Cirque Lodge, the staff, and fellow residents. 
 ” 

 

 
 Dual Diagnosis 

 Trauma Therapy 

 Experiential Therapy 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 

REHAB & DUAL DIAGNOSIS

At Cirque Lodge, we offer integrated programs that treat both mental health conditions and substance use disorders. We provide holistic treatment to work with the ‘whole client’, and our programs are personalized to meet their individual requirements.

 More about treatment 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 

TRAUMA THERAPY

Cirque Lodge emphasizes the importance of treating substance abuse and trauma together, as trauma often underlies addiction. Without addressing both, recovery is difficult—unresolved trauma can lead to relapse, while addiction can hinder emotional healing. Through an integrated approach, including trauma-informed therapy and addiction treatment, Cirque Lodge helps individuals heal both mind and body for lasting recovery.

Therapeutic Modalities
How we treat Trauma

 

Cognitive Behavioral Therapy (CBT)

Emotional Freedom Therapy (EFT)

Acceptance and Commitment Therapy (ACT)

Mindfulness-based Cognitive Therapy (MBCT)

Dialectical Behavioral Therapy (DBT)

Rational Emotive Therapy (RET)

Eye Movement Desensitization and Reprocessing (EMDR)

Brain Spotting

Sociometry

Psychodrama

Gestalt Therapy

Psychodynamic

Internal Family Systems

Narrative Exposure Therapy

 

 More about treatment 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 

Experiential Therapy

Experiential therapy allows you to explore and reinforce the skills you learn through mindful meditation and through exhilarating physical activities. It offers the chance to revive your mind, body, and soul as you partake in enriching experiences; empowering you to further explore and support the skills you learn through varying activities.

 More about treatment 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 

MOUNTAIN LUXURY RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT: HOME AWAY FROM HOME

We understand that addiction is not a choice, and we firmly believe that rehabilitation should not be a punishment. Our facilities are magnificently appointed, with exceptional bedrooms, gorgeous bathrooms, and stunning views of the mountains. We’re proud to have created an environment conducive to holistic healing.

Three well-balanced meals are prepared for residents each day. We use high-quality and fresh ingredients in all our food. When possible, we source our food locally. The kitchen is always full of healthy snacks, fruit, and vegetables that you may take as you please. We are also sensitive to the dietary needs of our clients and can prepare individualized meals on request.

Cirque Lodge offers residential rehabilitation programs for drug and alcohol abuse as well as other addiction recovery services.

 
 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 

 
“ You can rest assured that while you’re with us, we’ll take care of all your needs. We focus on you so that you can focus on healing and growth. ”

 

Exclusive Drug Detox Utah

 

 
 

 

 

 
 
 
 Luxury Utah Addiction Treatment Center

 
Our Treatment Options Include:

 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
Dual Diagnosis

 

 

Underlying mental illnesses and co-occurring disorders can be the driving force behind substance addiction. This program helps identify and treat these conditions to offer you the best chance of long-term recovery.

 MORE ABOUT TREATMENT
 
 
 

 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
Experiential Therapy

 

 

This therapy offers you the chance to revive your mind, body, and soul as you partake in enriching experiences.

 MORE ABOUT TREATMENT
 
 
 

 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
12-Step Program

 

 

One of the most effective recovery methods, the 12-step program is a powerful tool for personal growth, spiritual development, and maintaining abstinence.

 MORE ABOUT TREATMENT
 
 
 

 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
Therapeutic Modalities

 

 
 
 

Cognitive Behavioral Therapy (CBT)

Emotional Freedom Therapy (EFT)

Acceptance and Commitment Therapy (ACT)

Mindfulness-based Cognitive Therapy (MBCT)

Dialectical Behavioral Therapy (DBT)

Rational Emotive Therapy (RET)

Eye Movement Desensitization and Reprocessing (EMDR)

 
Brain Spotting

Sociometry

Psychodrama

Gestalt Therapy

Psychodynamic

Internal Family Systems

Narrative Exposure Therapy
 

 MORE ABOUT TREATMENT
 
 
 

 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
Drug And Alcohol Detox

 

 

We offer private inpatient detox facilities with twenty-four-hour supervision to allow a comfortable process.

 MORE ABOUT TREATMENT
 
 
 

 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
A Healing Family Program

 

 

We are a family-owned and based rehab facility, and we know how valuable involving families in the treatment process is.

 MORE ABOUT TREATMENT
 
 
 

 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
SEEKING ADDICTION RECOVERY IN UTAH 

 
If you or a loved one is struggling with an alcohol abuse or substance use disorder, we are here to support you.

We are dedicated to providing each client and their family with the most significant and professional level of care, enabling them to work towards a successful recovery. Our focus is on delivering the highest quality of compassionate care combined with clinical excellence in a trusting community.

Our remote natural surroundings provide unique opportunities to develop new skills and find inspiration for a healthy recovery.

 
 
 
 

 

 

 
 

 

 
World-Class Accommodations

 

 
Both the Lodge and the Studio offer world-class accommodations with breathtaking views of the surrounding mountains.

Cirque Lodge hosts a range of state-of-the-art facilities and stunning accommodations. We believe Cirque Lodge is the finest drug and alcohol treatment facility in any country.

We have a private gated entrance that speaks to our privacy not only for our residents but for their family and friends. We believe it is the most comprehensive treatment experience to be found anywhere in alcohol or drug treatment.

 

 

 

 

 

 
 

 

 
What We Offer

 

 

An indoor and outdoor horse arena where we offer equine therapy in all seasons.

An art therapy room with the most modern equipment in the treatment industry.

A recording studio where you can use music to help your recovery.

12 acres of private land containing hybrid rose gardens, a greenhouse and organic vegetable gardens.

State-of-the-art fitness center, full-court indoor basketball court, indoor and outdoor pickleball courts,  1/2 mile 12-step walking path, sand volleyball court, 12-hole chipping and putting green and outdoor movie theater.

A space for massages and a hair salon.

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 

 

 
Advanced Indoor Ropes

 

 
One of our most impressive activities is our ropes course and climbing area.

Our adventure ropes course is located in our state-of-the-art Studio facility and is in a 17,000ft sound stage with 50ft ceilings. The course helps you step outside your comfort zone, overcome your fears, and learn to believe in yourself. You also develop important team-building skills and explore trust and communication with others.

Our high ropes course has an incredible number of different elements. The main course is a series of thirty-nine climbing steps and challenges that take you from one giant tripod to the other.

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
The Time for Treatment

is Today

 
 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 
 
 

 
 75 %

 
Up to 75% Recover From Addiction

 

Most people who want to recover from a substance use problem eventually do. It usually takes a few tries, but most people only need two attempts.

 

 

 
 
 

 
 22.3 M

 
22.3 Million Americans Have Succeeded

 

22.3 million Americans have overcome an alcohol or other drug problem. This means that nearly 1 in 10 U.S. adults have overcome a substance use problem.

 

 

 
 
 

 
 80 %

 
80% of people accomplish a major achievement

 

80% of people who had overcome an alcohol or other drug problem accomplished at least one major achievement associated with self-improvement.

 

 

 
 
 

 
 100.000 

 
Over 100,000 Overdose Deaths in 2021

 

There were 100,306 drug overdose deaths in the United States during a 12-month period ending in April 2021. This number is up 28.5% from 2020.

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 

 
Your Journey To Recovery Begins Today – Mountain Luxury Drug & Alcohol Rehab Center in Utah

 

Our inpatient treatment program combines various treatment approaches to provide you with a holistic recovery experience.

 

 
 (800) 582-0709 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 

PERSONALIZED TREATMENT

If you’re struggling with addiction to alcohol or drugs, we can help. We’ll give you the support you need and the space to grow. Our focus is on providing the highest quality of compassionate care combined with clinical excellence. We use the most modern and effective addiction treatment and the shared knowledge of our highly qualified staff.

We are licensed by the State of Utah and accredited by the Joint Commission for the Accreditation of Healthcare Organization (JCAHO).

 More about Drug Rehab

Our Ethos
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
Cirque Lodge is dedicated to providing the most effective addiction treatment with compassion, dignity, and respect. Privacy and confidentiality are our highest priority.

We understand that addiction is not a choice, and rehabilitation should not be a punishment. Our residential program is an enriching experience that nurtures personal development. It offers you a fresh start and lays the foundations for a joyful and productive life.

 
 

 
 
 MORE ABOUT OUR TREATMENT PHILOSOPHY
 
 
 

 
 
 
 

 

 
What We Offer
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
WHO WE TREAT: Cirque Lodge offers residential rehabilitation programs for drug and alcohol abuse and addiction.

We ensure our programs are as flexible as possible, so we can meet your specific needs. We work with you to arrange the length of stay, accommodation options, and treatment plan that suits you. At Cirque Lodge, we understand that there are many causes of your addiction. Healing involves working through all of these so you can fully embrace recovery.

 
 

 
 
 MORE INFORMATION ABOUT US
 
 
 

 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 
 

DUAL-DIAGNOSIS LUXURY REHAB

 

Addiction is often the result of co-occurring disorders. At Cirque Lodge, our inpatient rehab facility treatment utilizes dual diagnosis treatment to assess the cause and nature of your addiction. We offer integrated programs that include dual diagnosis as part of our drug addiction treatment as we evaluate both issues with a focus on recovery.

As a rehab center we provide holistic treatment to improve the quality of life for our residents. Our programs are designed and led by our professional medical team, master-level therapists, and other experts.

Throughout your stay, you can take advantage of twenty-four-hour medical advice and care.

We support patients from all over the USA. For example, from: Salt Lake City , Provo .

A Safe Place to Heal and Recover

 

Our individualized treatment programs offer an enriching rehabilitation experience tailored to suit your needs. The breathtaking mountains surrounding our center are the perfect place to heal. Our magnificent location offers unique opportunities to reconnect with your true self and rediscover your love of life.

 

 
 More about Treatment 
 

 

 

 
 
 
FAQs About Drug & Alcohol Rehab

 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 What Is a Luxury Drug Rehab Center?
 
 

 
A Luxury Drug Rehab Center is a type of treatment facility that offers a higher standard of comfort, care, and amenities compared to traditional rehab facilities. Cirque Lodge is a perfect example of a exclusive rehab center. Our facility provides comprehensive treatment in an environment that combines the beauty of nature with the comfort of upscale accommodations.

 

 

 

 
 What Sets Cirque Lodge Apart From Other Rehab Centers?
 
 

 
Cirque Lodge is set in the beautiful and serene landscapes of Sundance and Orem, Utah. We offer an individualized treatment approach with a low staff-to-patient ratio, shared and private rooms, gourmet meals, and numerous recreational activities. At our exceptional rehab facilities, we use a combination of evidence-based therapies, experiential therapy, and 12-step programs.

 

 

 

 
 How Long Does Treatment Usually Last at a Rehab Center?
 
 

 
The length of treatment at a rehab center varies depending on each individual’s needs and progress in recovery. Generally, a stay at a rehab center can range from 30 to 90 days, but some clients choose to stay longer.

 

 

 

 
 How Much Does Exclusive Rehab Cost?
 
 

 
The cost of treatment at exclusive rehab centers like Cirque Lodge varies depending on the specific program and length of stay. We recommend contacting our admissions team directly for more specific information regarding cost.

 

 

 

 
 Does Insurance Cover Rehab?
 
 

 
Cirque Lodge works with most insurance providers to make rehab affordable. The extent to which treatment is covered will depend on the specifics of your individual insurance plan. Our team can assist with insurance verification to help you understand the details of your coverage.

 

 

 

 
 Is Privacy Guaranteed at a Rehab Center?
 
 

 
At Cirque Lodge, we uphold the highest standards of privacy and confidentiality. All treatment records are kept strictly confidential for our resdients, and we offer private accommodations in a safe, secure environment. We are committed to maintaining the privacy of all our residents.

 

 

 

 
 Is There Aftercare Support Available After Leaving Cirque Lodge?
 
 

 
At Cirque Lodge, we believe that aftercare is a crucial part of the recovery journey. We provide comprehensive aftercare plans following exceptional rehab treatment, which can include referrals to outpatient treatment programs, help with finding sober living arrangements, and alumni support groups

 

 

 

 
 What Is the Success Rate of People Who Go To Rehab?
 
 

 
Success rates for rehab can vary widely depending on a multitude of factors such as the type of factors such as the type of addiction, personal circumstances, the quality of the program, and the measurement of success.  According to the National Institute on Drug Abuse, about 40% to 60% of those who go through addiction treatment may relapse, which underscores that addiction is a chronic disease, similar to hypertension or asthma. However, this doesn’t mean that treatment is unsuccessful.  Many individuals who go through treatment experience significant improvements in their quality of life, even if they relapse at some point. Continued aftercare and support can greatly improve long-term success.

 

 

 

 

 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 
About Cirque Lodge

 

 
Cirque Lodge is a recovery retreat providing cognitive and experiential therapies, in the pristine natural beauty of Utah’s Rocky Mountains.

 
Cirque Lodge is considered among our colleagues, as one of, if not the premium drug and alcohol rehab facility in the country.

<section class="section section--align-center content-wrapper">



    

<h2 class="wp-block-heading" id="rehab-treatment-at-cirque-lodge">Rehab Treatment At Cirque Lodge</h2>



<p>Cirque Lodge is a private and luxury addiction treatment center in the heart of the Rocky Mountains. We offer an enriching rehabilitation experience that aims to heal your entire person. Our team of medical professionals provides a combination of evidence-based treatment approaches adapted to suit your personal needs. Our exceptional treatment facilities and 24-hour care offer safety and comfort throughout your stay. The serenity of the mountains provides space for calm reflection and inspiration on your journey towards life-long recovery.</p>




</section>

    <p class="has-medium-font-size"><em>“Residential treatment needs to be effective, attractive, active, and enlightened, but most importantly it needs to be connected and continued with the community at large.”</em></p>

      <div class="h4">Founder, Cirque Lodge</div>

<div class="wp-block-column is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow">
<h2 class="wp-block-heading" id="headline-20-63595">Gary Fisher Receives the Nelson Bradley Career Achievement Award from NAATP (National Association of Addiction Treatment Providers)</h2>



<section class="section section--blockquote section--old-align-left section--default " >

				
		
    <div class="section__inner">      <blockquote class="blockquote blockquote--author">
    <p>We’re thrilled to announce that our own Gary Fisher has been honored with the prestigious Nelson Bradley Career Achievement Award. This award recognizes Gary’s decades-long commitment to transforming addiction treatment and recovery services. Through his unwavering dedication, compassion, and innovative approach, Gary has profoundly impacted countless lives, helping individuals on their journey to recovery. Congratulations Gary.</p>

    <div class="h3">Gary Fisher</div>
      </blockquote>
    </div>
</section>
</div>
</div>




</section>

<section class="section section--align-center section--with-background section--background-gray content-wrapper">

		<div class="section__background"></div>


    

<div class="wp-block-columns is-layout-flex wp-container-core-columns-is-layout-9d6595d7 wp-block-columns-is-layout-flex">
<div class="wp-block-column is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow">
<p>Rehabilitation should be an enriching experience that creates long-lasting change. Recovery is a process of personal growth and self-discovery where you learn and develop the skills to live a joyous and healthy life.</p>



<p>Cirque Lodge focuses on the holistic healing of the mind, body, and soul. The world-renowned 12-step method for spiritual development and maintaining abstinence underpins our rehab program. You learn and strengthen skills in behavioral therapy sessions and through exciting practical activities in the breathtaking scenery surrounding the center. We dedicate our treatment to your family as well as yourself.</p>



<p>Cirque Lodge has a recovery orientated philosophy. Our rehabilitation experience is the start of a journey to lifelong recovery. Our care continues long after you leave the center, with an individualized aftercare plan connecting you to support networks in your local area. You can join our alumni program to keep gaining strength from the community here.</p>
</div>

<div class="wp-block-column is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow">
<h2 class="wp-block-heading" id="staff">Staff</h2>



<p>At Cirque Lodge, we provide the highest level of care, so you can focus on your recovery. Our professional medical team, therapists, and other staff are available 24-hours a day to cater to your needs. We are by your side to guide you through difficult times at any time of day or night.</p>



<p>Medical experts design and lead your individualized treatment program. We provide you with a personal counselor who stays with you throughout the program and makes any changes or improvements required as you progress.</p>



<p>Our staff are non-judgemental, and they treat all clients with compassion and respect. Many of our team members are themselves in recovery and have a deep and meaningful understanding of your experience. We are fully committed to you and your recovery.</p>

<section class="section section--align-center content-wrapper">



    

<h2 class="wp-block-heading" id="rehab-treatment-at-cirque-lodge">Rehab Treatment At Cirque Lodge</h2>



<p>The most effective drug and alcohol addiction treatments provide an individualized program that caters to the needs of the entire person.</p>



<p>At Cirque Lodge, we are committed to offering the most effective treatment for you. Our expert staff draws upon extensive scientific research and personal experience to provide the most advanced and up-to-date inpatient treatment experience.</p>



<p>Our program combines behavioral therapies, experiential therapy, and support groups tailored to suit your specific needs. We provide a holistic healing experience that helps you grow as a person, heal relationships with others, and reconnect with your love of life. We lay the foundations for long-term recovery and a life free from addiction.</p>




</section>

<h2 class="wp-block-heading" id="dual-diagnosis">Dual Diagnosis</h2>



<p>Many people who struggle with an addiction also have a co-occurring disorder or another underlying mental health condition. Co-occurring disorders are often the driving force behind addiction. If untreated, they can cause addictive behaviors to re-emerge, even after long periods of sobriety.</p>



<p>Cirque Lodge focuses on providing a caring and sensitive environment for clients dealing with dual diagnoses. We provide the highest levels of comfort and support so that you have the energy and space to review and discuss complex situations, and our expertly trained, professional staff will support you as you work through sensitive issues.</p>

<div class="wp-block-column is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow">
<h2 class="wp-block-heading" id="cognitive-therapy">Cognitive Therapy</h2>



<p>Long-term recovery from addiction involves more than just withdrawing from drugs or alcohol. It requires identifying the causes of your addiction and developing ways to overcome them.</p>



<p>In cognitive-behavioral therapy (CBT) sessions, you work with a therapist to identify the thought patterns, feelings, and behaviors that cause you to use a substance and develop skills to avoid or change them. This may involve identifying triggers and developing strategies to avoid them or learning how to cope with them in other ways.</p>



<p>CBT is among the most effective and common methods for long-term recovery from addiction. NIDI research has found that the skills you learn through CBT stay with you long after you finish treatment. It is a powerful tool for long-lasting change.</p>

</div>
</div>
</div>




</section>

<div class="wp-block-column is-vertically-aligned-center is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow">
<h2 class="wp-block-heading" id="experiential-therapy">Experiential Therapy</h2>



<p>In experiential therapy, you strengthen and reinforce the skills you have learned in therapy sessions through enriching outdoor activities. Our state-of-the-art treatment facilities and spectacular natural surroundings offer various activities including, horse-riding, mountain hikes, and a high ropes course.</p>



<p>Experiential activities offer a break from more intense cognitive therapies and are a powerful tool for recovery. They help you discover new passions, find inspiration in the world around you, and rediscover your love of life.</p>

<div class="wp-block-column is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow">
<h2 class="wp-block-heading" id="individualized-treatment">Individualized Treatment</h2>



<p>The 12-steps of Alcoholics Anonymous underpin our residential treatment program. The 12-steps are a world-renowned program for life-long recovery from addiction and substance abuse.</p>



<p>You explore the 12-steps guiding principles through support group meetings. Group meetings are an invaluable tool for learning from each other, providing mutual support, and finding comfort in a shared experience.</p>



<p>Regular support meetings are fundamental to continuing care and recovery after you have left the center. They provide a constant source of motivation and support to help you rejoin society and overcome challenges in future years.</p>



<p>At Cirque Lodge, our treatment program is recovery orientated. At the end of your stay, we provide you with a comprehensive aftercare plan that offers guidance and support for the rest of your recovery.</p>



<p>When you walk out of our doors, we know it is not the end of our journey. We are only ever a phone call away, and you can return for support whenever you need it.</p>

                                                                <h2 class="cta__headline">A Safe Place to Heal and Recover</h2>
                                                                <div class="cta__text"><p>Our individualized treatment programs offer an enriching rehabilitation experience tailored to suit your needs. 				<h3 class="h4">About Cirque Lodge</h3>
				<div class="page-footer__column-text">
					<p>Cirque Lodge is a recovery retreat providing cognitive and experiential therapies, in the pristine natural beauty of Utah’s Rocky Mountains.</p>
					<p>Cirque Lodge is considered among our colleagues, as one of, if not the premium drug and alcohol rehab facility in the country.</p>

var option_button_pdf = {
    source:'https://www.cirquelodge.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/02/Brochure-for-Website-compressed-1-1-1-1.pdf',
    webgl:true,
};

function loadDFlipAssets() {
    // Add CSS file
    const link = document.createElement("link");
    link.rel = "stylesheet";
    link.href = "https://www.cirquelodge.com/wp-content/themes/bv-theme/assets/dist/css/components/dflip.min.css";
    document.head.appendChild(link);

    // Add JS file
    const script = document.createElement("script");
    script.src = "https://www.cirquelodge.com/wp-content/themes/bv-theme/assets/dist/js/components/dflip.min.js";
    script.addEventListener('load', () => {
        setTimeout(() => {
            document.querySelector('.dear-flip a').classList.remove('loading');
            document.querySelector('.dear-flip a').click();
        }, 2500);
    });
    document.body.appendChild(script);
}
if (document.querySelector('.dear-flip a'))
document.querySelector('.dear-flip a').addEventListener('click', (e) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    document.querySelector('.dear-flip a').setAttribute('href', '#');
    document.querySelector('.dear-flip a').classList.add('loading');
    document.querySelector('.dear-flip a').classList.add('_df_button');
    document.querySelector('.dear-flip a').setAttribute('id', 'button_pdf')
    loadDFlipAssets();
}, { once: true })

window.addEventListener('load', () => {
    if (window.location.hash.startsWith('#button_pdf')) {
        const link = document.querySelector('.dear-flip a');
        if (link) {
            link.setAttribute('href', '#');
            link.classList.add('loading');
            link.classList.add('_df_button');
            link.setAttribute('id', 'button_pdf');
            loadDFlipAssets();
        }
    }
});
</script>

About Us - Cirque Lodge

 800-582-0709 
 Call Us 
 
 
 
 Help 
 Help is Waiting 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 Menu 
 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 About Us
 

 

Rehab Treatment At Cirque Lodge

Cirque Lodge is a private and luxury addiction treatment center in the heart of the Rocky Mountains. We offer an enriching rehabilitation experience that aims to heal your entire person. Our team of medical professionals provides a combination of evidence-based treatment approaches adapted to suit your personal needs. Our exceptional treatment facilities and 24-hour care offer safety and comfort throughout your stay. The serenity of the mountains provides space for calm reflection and inspiration on your journey towards life-long recovery.

 

 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 

Our Philosophy

 
 
 
 
 
 “Residential treatment needs to be effective, attractive, active, and enlightened, but most importantly it needs to be connected and continued with the community at large.” 

 
Richard Losee

 
Founder, Cirque Lodge

 
 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 

Gary Fisher Receives the Nelson Bradley Career Achievement Award from NAATP (National Association of Addiction Treatment Providers)

 
 
 
 
 
We’re thrilled to announce that our own Gary Fisher has been honored with the prestigious Nelson Bradley Career Achievement Award. This award recognizes Gary’s decades-long commitment to transforming addiction treatment and recovery services. Through his unwavering dedication, compassion, and innovative approach, Gary has profoundly impacted countless lives, helping individuals on their journey to recovery. Congratulations Gary.

 
Gary Fisher

 
 

 

 

Rehabilitation should be an enriching experience that creates long-lasting change. Recovery is a process of personal growth and self-discovery where you learn and develop the skills to live a joyous and healthy life.

Cirque Lodge focuses on the holistic healing of the mind, body, and soul. The world-renowned 12-step method for spiritual development and maintaining abstinence underpins our rehab program. You learn and strengthen skills in behavioral therapy sessions and through exciting practical activities in the breathtaking scenery surrounding the center. We dedicate our treatment to your family as well as yourself.

Cirque Lodge has a recovery orientated philosophy. Our rehabilitation experience is the start of a journey to lifelong recovery. Our care continues long after you leave the center, with an individualized aftercare plan connecting you to support networks in your local area. You can join our alumni program to keep gaining strength from the community here.

 
 
 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 
Brittany Harris

 
Executive Director

 

 

 
Brittany began working at Cirque Lodge in 1999 and by 2008 was working as a member of the management team, overseeing different aspects of the functional operations side of our facilities. Over the next 12 years she continued in this capacity, working…

 Read more 
 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 
Nic Losee

 
Operations Director

 

 

 
Nic began working at Cirque Lodge in 2002 as an executive assistant. During his tenure Nic has worked with nearly every department in the organization. He currently manages the day to day functional aspects of our operation, providing administrative…

 Read more 
 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 
Beverly Roesch, LCSW

 
Clinical Director & Therapist

 

 

 
Bev is originally from New York City where she studied at the State University of New York at New Paltz and Stony Brook. She relocated to Utah and completed her graduate work at the University of Utah earning her Master of Social Work. Bev has worked…

 Read more 
 

 

Staff

At Cirque Lodge, we provide the highest level of care, so you can focus on your recovery. Our professional medical team, therapists, and other staff are available 24-hours a day to cater to your needs. We are by your side to guide you through difficult times at any time of day or night.

Medical experts design and lead your individualized treatment program. We provide you with a personal counselor who stays with you throughout the program and makes any changes or improvements required as you progress.

Our staff are non-judgemental, and they treat all clients with compassion and respect. Many of our team members are themselves in recovery and have a deep and meaningful understanding of your experience. We are fully committed to you and your recovery.

 Meet the Team 

 

Rehab Treatment At Cirque Lodge

The most effective drug and alcohol addiction treatments provide an individualized program that caters to the needs of the entire person.

At Cirque Lodge, we are committed to offering the most effective treatment for you. Our expert staff draws upon extensive scientific research and personal experience to provide the most advanced and up-to-date inpatient treatment experience.

Our program combines behavioral therapies, experiential therapy, and support groups tailored to suit your specific needs. We provide a holistic healing experience that helps you grow as a person, heal relationships with others, and reconnect with your love of life. We lay the foundations for long-term recovery and a life free from addiction.

 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 

 
Our rehab programs

 

Our rehab programs follow the World Health Organization (WHO) International Standards for the Treatment of Drug Use Disorders, and our treatment options include:

 

 
 

 

 

 

 

Dual Diagnosis

Many people who struggle with an addiction also have a co-occurring disorder or another underlying mental health condition. Co-occurring disorders are often the driving force behind addiction. If untreated, they can cause addictive behaviors to re-emerge, even after long periods of sobriety.

Cirque Lodge focuses on providing a caring and sensitive environment for clients dealing with dual diagnoses. We provide the highest levels of comfort and support so that you have the energy and space to review and discuss complex situations, and our expertly trained, professional staff will support you as you work through sensitive issues.

 DUAL DIAGNOSIS 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 

Cognitive Therapy

Long-term recovery from addiction involves more than just withdrawing from drugs or alcohol. It requires identifying the causes of your addiction and developing ways to overcome them.

In cognitive-behavioral therapy (CBT) sessions, you work with a therapist to identify the thought patterns, feelings, and behaviors that cause you to use a substance and develop skills to avoid or change them. This may involve identifying triggers and developing strategies to avoid them or learning how to cope with them in other ways.

CBT is among the most effective and common methods for long-term recovery from addiction. NIDI research has found that the skills you learn through CBT stay with you long after you finish treatment. It is a powerful tool for long-lasting change.

 COGNITIVE THERAPY 

 

 

Experiential Therapy

In experiential therapy, you strengthen and reinforce the skills you have learned in therapy sessions through enriching outdoor activities. Our state-of-the-art treatment facilities and spectacular natural surroundings offer various activities including, horse-riding, mountain hikes, and a high ropes course.

Experiential activities offer a break from more intense cognitive therapies and are a powerful tool for recovery. They help you discover new passions, find inspiration in the world around you, and rediscover your love of life.

 EXPERIENTIAL THERAPY 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 

Individualized Treatment

The 12-steps of Alcoholics Anonymous underpin our residential treatment program. The 12-steps are a world-renowned program for life-long recovery from addiction and substance abuse.

You explore the 12-steps guiding principles through support group meetings. Group meetings are an invaluable tool for learning from each other, providing mutual support, and finding comfort in a shared experience.

Regular support meetings are fundamental to continuing care and recovery after you have left the center. They provide a constant source of motivation and support to help you rejoin society and overcome challenges in future years.

At Cirque Lodge, our treatment program is recovery orientated. At the end of your stay, we provide you with a comprehensive aftercare plan that offers guidance and support for the rest of your recovery.

When you walk out of our doors, we know it is not the end of our journey. We are only ever a phone call away, and you can return for support whenever you need it.

 COGNITIVE THERAPY 

 
 

 

 
 
 
 

 

 

 
 

 
Have any questions?

A Safe Place to Heal and Recover

 

Our individualized treatment programs offer an enriching rehabilitation experience tailored to suit your needs. The breathtaking mountains surrounding our center are the perfect place to heal. Our magnificent location offers unique opportunities to reconnect with your true self and rediscover your love of life.

 

 
 More About Us 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 
About Cirque Lodge

 

 
Cirque Lodge is a recovery retreat providing cognitive and experiential therapies, in the pristine natural beauty of Utah’s Rocky Mountains.

 
Cirque Lodge is considered among our colleagues, as one of, if not the premium drug and alcohol rehab facility in the country.

    <h1 class="twig-hero__title" id="admissions">
        Admissions
        </h1>

<section class="section section--align-center content-wrapper">



    


<header class="section__header">
  

<h2 class="wp-block-heading" id="admissions-overview">Admissions Overview</h2>




</header>


<div class="wp-block-columns is-layout-flex wp-container-core-columns-is-layout-9d6595d7 wp-block-columns-is-layout-flex">
<div class="wp-block-column is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow">
<p>Surrounded by the spectacular Rocky Mountains, Cirque Lodge combines <a href="https://www.cirquelodge.com/treatment/cognitive-therapy/">behavioral therapy</a>, <a href="https://www.cirquelodge.com/treatment/experiential-therapy/">experiential therapy</a>, and support programs to help you rediscover what you love in life and guide you to lifelong recovery.</p>
</div>



<div class="wp-block-column is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow">
<p>If you or your loved one is suffering from a drug or alcohol addiction, please contact us as soon as possible. Our compassionate admissions team is here to help guide you through the rehab admission process and answer any questions you might have.</p>
</div>
</div>




</section>


<section class="section section--blockquote section--old-align-left section--default " >

				
		
    <div class="section__inner">      <blockquote class="blockquote">
    <p>Take these simple steps to begin the journey to recovery and freedom from addiction.</p>

      </blockquote>
    </div>
</section>


<section class="section section--align-center content-wrapper">



    

<div class="wp-block-columns is-layout-flex wp-container-core-columns-is-layout-9d6595d7 wp-block-columns-is-layout-flex">
<div class="wp-block-column is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow"><picture class="image__picture">
        
    <source srcset="https://www.cirquelodge.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/04/Picture-2-Home-and-Garden-800x0-c-default.webp" media="(min-width: 1440px)"/>

    <source srcset="https://www.cirquelodge.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/04/Picture-2-Home-and-Garden-400x0-c-default.webp" media="(min-width: 767px)" />

    <img decoding="async" class="image__picture-image" src="https://www.cirquelodge.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/04/Picture-2-Home-and-Garden-320x0-c-default.webp" width="320" height="304" alt="Picture 2 Home and Garden" loading="lazy" />
</picture></div>



<div class="wp-block-column is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow">
<h2 class="wp-block-heading" id="receive-the-help-you-deserve">Receive the Help You Deserve</h2>



<p>At Cirque Lodge, we make your journey to our addiction center as easy and relaxing as possible. Our staff will help you navigate through the admission process. Once you decide on an admission date and fly into our local airport, our staff will handle your transportation to our facility.</p>



<p>Once you arrive at our facility, we will make sure you are comfortable and have everything you need. When you are ready, our medically trained professionals will guide you through the start of your addiction treatment program.</p>



<p>For information on what to bring with you to the center, please give us a call or read through the <a href="/admissions/pre-arrival-checklist/" rel="noreferrer">Pre-Arrival Checklist</a> and <a href="/admissions/things-to-bring/" rel="noreferrer">What to Bring Guide</a> here.</p>



<div class="wp-block-buttons is-layout-flex wp-block-buttons-is-layout-flex">
<div class="wp-block-button"><a class="wp-block-button__link wp-element-button" href="/admissions/things-to-bring/">What To Bring</a></div>
</div>
</div>
</div>




</section>

<div class="wp-block-column is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow">
<h2 class="wp-block-heading" id="take-a-confidential-assessment">Take a Confidential Assessment</h2>



<p>One of our professionals will take you through a confidential assessment to understand what kind of <a href="https://www.cirquelodge.com/treatment/">treatment program</a> you need. Our conversation will be simple, relaxed, and entirely confidential.</p>



<p>We can answer any questions you may have about our drug and alcohol rehab, medically supervised detox and our dual diagnosis program. We can discuss which of our world-class treatment facilities will work best for you.</p>



<p>If needed, we will direct you to other resources to help and support you in your recovery.</p>



<div class="wp-block-buttons is-layout-flex wp-block-buttons-is-layout-flex">
<div class="wp-block-button"><a class="wp-block-button__link wp-element-button" href="https://forms.cirquelodge.com/assessment/">Confidential Assessment</a></div>
</div>
</div>
</div>




</section>

</picture></div>



<div class="wp-block-column is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow">
<h2 class="wp-block-heading" id="contact-our-admissions-team">Contact Our Admissions Team</h2>



<p>When you or a loved one struggles with an alcohol or drug addiction, making the first phone call to ask for help is often the most challenging part of recovery.</p>



<p>At Cirque Lodge, we make this step as easy and comfortable for you as possible. Our admissions counselors are compassionate, experienced, and non-judgmental.</p>



<p>We understand the anxiety and worry you may be experiencing. We are here to help ease your fears, answer your questions, and start your journey to lifelong recovery.</p>



<p>If you call for a loved one, we will provide advice and support on how you can help them begin their healing process.</p>



<p>Please contact our admissions team by calling <a href="tel:8005820709">800-582-0709</a> or filling in our online form.</p>



<div class="wp-block-buttons is-layout-flex wp-block-buttons-is-layout-flex">
<div class="wp-block-button"><a class="wp-block-button__link wp-element-button" href="/contact/">Contact Us</a></div>
</div>
</div>
</div>




</section>

<section class="section section--align-center content-wrapper">



    

<div class="wp-block-columns is-layout-flex wp-container-core-columns-is-layout-9d6595d7 wp-block-columns-is-layout-flex">
<div class="wp-block-column is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow">
<h2 class="wp-block-heading" id="admissions-assessment">Admissions Assessment</h2>



<p>In the past few decades, scientists and medical professionals have done extensive research into the science of addiction. Psychologists, therapists, neuroscientists, and addiction specialists have explored the causes of addiction and the best treatment methods.</p>



<p>We use mental and physical assessments to gain a comprehensive understanding of your addiction and design the most effective treatment plan for you. At Cirque Lodge, our medical professionals can use this insight to offer the most accurate and up-to-date treatment available.</p>
</div>



<div class="wp-block-column is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow">
<h2 class="wp-block-heading" id="confidential-and-compassionate">Confidential and Compassionate</h2>



<p>We understand that talking about your addiction can be difficult, especially in the first stages of recovery. We can assure you that our assessments are conducted with compassion and without judgment. We want to make the process as easy as possible for you.</p>



<p>Any information you share will be kept entirely confidential.</p>
</div>
</div>




</section>

<section class="section section--align-center content-wrapper">



    

<div class="wp-block-columns is-layout-flex wp-container-core-columns-is-layout-9d6595d7 wp-block-columns-is-layout-flex">
<div class="wp-block-column is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow"><picture class="image__picture">
        
    <source srcset="https://www.cirquelodge.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/04/Picture-5-Helping-Hands-800x0-c-default.webp" media="(min-width: 1440px)"/>
    <source srcset="https://www.cirquelodge.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/04/Picture-5-Helping-Hands-600x0-c-default.webp" media="(min-width: 1024px)"/>
    <source srcset="https://www.cirquelodge.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/04/Picture-5-Helping-Hands-400x0-c-default.webp" media="(min-width: 767px)" />
    <source srcset="https://www.cirquelodge.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/04/Picture-5-Helping-Hands-600x0-c-default.webp" media="(min-width: 400px)" />

    <img decoding="async" class="image__picture-image" src="https://www.cirquelodge.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/04/Picture-5-Helping-Hands-320x0-c-default.webp" width="320" height="239" alt="Picture 5 Helping Hands" loading="lazy" />
</picture></div>



<div class="wp-block-column is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow">
<h2 class="wp-block-heading" id="mental-assessment">Mental Assessment</h2>



<p>At Cirque Lodge, we provide a range of mental assessments to gain the best possible insight into your addiction. These include:</p>



<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li>Psychological testing</li>



<li>Neuropsychological testing</li>



<li>Cognitive testing</li>



<li>Personality testing</li>
</ul>
</div>
</div>




</section>

<section class="section section--align-center content-wrapper">



    

<div class="wp-block-columns is-layout-flex wp-container-core-columns-is-layout-9d6595d7 wp-block-columns-is-layout-flex">
<div class="wp-block-column is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow">
<h2 class="wp-block-heading" id="psychological-testing">Psychological Testing</h2>



<p>The purpose of psychological testing is to identify any co-occurring disorders you have that may contribute to your addiction. These may include depression, anxiety, and panic disorders.</p>



<p>While neuropsychological testing focuses specifically on the effect drug abuse has had on your brain, psychological testing gives a broader overview of emotional or behavioral disorders.</p>



<p>While neuropsychological testing focuses specifically on the effect drug abuse has had on your brain, psychological testing gives a broader overview of emotional or behavioral disorders.</p>



<p>At Cirque Lodge, we use a variety of different psychological tests in our assessments. These include:</p>



<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li>Structured clinical interview for DSM-V</li>



<li>Personality Assessment Inventory</li>



<li>Mini-International Neuropsychiatric Interview</li>



<li>Millon Clinical Multiaxial Inventory-III</li>



<li>Minnesota Multiphasic Personality Inventory (MMPI)</li>
</ul>



<p>Diagnosing co-occurring disorders is an essential part of our assessment process. <a href="https://www.samhsa.gov/data/sites/default/files/NSDUH-FFR1-2016/NSDUH-FFR1-2016.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener">SAMSHA’s </a>research finds that almost half of people with a substance use disorder have a co-occurring disorder.</p>



<p>Co-occurring disorders are often the underlying cause of substance use. If left untreated, the same patterns may re-trigger substance abuse and addiction even after an initial recovery.</p>



<p>At Cirque Lodge, we treat co-occurring disorders in our dual diagnosis program. This provides you with a complete healing process where you recover from the disorders that underlie your addiction. Diagnosis through psychological testing is the first stage of this process.</p>





<p>Psychological testing also helps us identify and address interpersonal and intrapersonal issues that could affect your recovery.</p>



<h2 class="wp-block-heading" id="addiction-assessment">Addiction Assessment</h2>



<p>Addiction testing assesses the extent of your addiction to drugs or alcohol. We will ask you how many units you are drinking or how many drugs you are using. This helps us to design the most effective treatment plan for you.</p>





<p>We also review your existing prescriptions and diagnoses to offer the appropriate level of care throughout your time at the center. This information is particularly important for your treatment during the detoxification process.</p>
</div>



<div class="wp-block-column is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow">
<h2 class="wp-block-heading" id="neuropsychological-testing">Neuropsychological Testing</h2>



<p>Neuropsychological testing assesses the effect drug use has had on your brain. It informs us which mental skills your addiction has impacted the most and which ones may still function well.</p>



<p>During the assessment, a team member will ask you to answer several questions verbally and repeat specific sentences or phrases back to them. They will also give you a sheet of written questions to answer. We may also ask you to move around or perform specific actions in a particular order.</p>



<p>The results of these tests will give us in-depth information about your mental skills, including:</p>



<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li>Cognition and emotional health</li>



<li>Executive functioning</li>



<li>Working memory function</li>



<li>Attention</li>



<li>Language skills</li>



<li>Motor coordination</li>



<li>Memory</li>
</ul>





<p>Our analysts then compare your results to other people who have a similar background and history to yourself. This gives us a clearer picture of the extent to which your addiction has affected your brain. We use this information to design the most accurate and beneficial treatment plan for you.</p>



<h2 class="wp-block-heading" id="physical-health-assessment">Physical Health Assessment</h2>



<p>During physical health assessments, we measure the physical effects of drug abuse and addiction on your body. We test for certain diseases that may have resulted from the addiction. <a href="https://www.drugabuse.gov/publications/principles-drug-addiction-treatment-research-based-guide-third-edition/principles-effective-treatment" target="_blank" rel="noopener">The National Institute of Drug Abuse</a> lists physical testing as a principle of effective treatment.</p>



<p>Our standard tests include:</p>



<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li>Hepatitis C and HIV blood tests</li>



<li>Liver function test</li>
</ul>





<p>Physical testing allows us to pinpoint any physical conditions that might require treatment during your time at Cirque Lodge or afterward. Our team will incorporate this into your inpatient treatment and aftercare programs.</p>
</div>
</div>




</section></div></div>
