<script id='script-67bdc57539a1a-js' type='text/javascript'>
var option_button_pdf = {
    source:'https://www.cirquelodge.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/02/Brochure-for-Website-compressed-1-1-1-1.pdf',
    webgl:true,
};

function loadDFlipAssets() {
    // Add CSS file
    const link = document.createElement("link");
    link.rel = "stylesheet";
    link.href = "https://www.cirquelodge.com/wp-content/themes/bv-theme/assets/dist/css/components/dflip.min.css";
    document.head.appendChild(link);

    // Add JS file
    const script = document.createElement("script");
    script.src = "https://www.cirquelodge.com/wp-content/themes/bv-theme/assets/dist/js/components/dflip.min.js";
    script.addEventListener('load', () => {
        setTimeout(() => {
            document.querySelector('.dear-flip a').classList.remove('loading');
            document.querySelector('.dear-flip a').click();
        }, 2500);
    });
    document.body.appendChild(script);
}
if (document.querySelector('.dear-flip a'))
document.querySelector('.dear-flip a').addEventListener('click', (e) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    document.querySelector('.dear-flip a').setAttribute('href', '#');
    document.querySelector('.dear-flip a').classList.add('loading');
    document.querySelector('.dear-flip a').classList.add('_df_button');
    document.querySelector('.dear-flip a').setAttribute('id', 'button_pdf')
    loadDFlipAssets();
}, { once: true })

window.addEventListener('load', () => {
    if (window.location.hash.startsWith('#button_pdf')) {
        const link = document.querySelector('.dear-flip a');
        if (link) {
            link.setAttribute('href', '#');
            link.classList.add('loading');
            link.classList.add('_df_button');
            link.setAttribute('id', 'button_pdf');
            loadDFlipAssets();
        }
    }
});
</script>

Admissions - Cirque Lodge

 Addiction

 Benzodiazepine Addiction 

 
 Cocaine Addiction 

 
 Heroin Addiction 

 
 Marijuana Addiction 

 
 Meth Addiction

 Drug Addiction vs Drug Abuse 

 

 Facilities

 The Studio 

 
 Gallery 

 

 Family

 Family Program 

 
 Family Week Schedule 

 
 What Family Can Expect 

 
 How to Help a Loved One 

 
 Signs of Drug Addiction 

 

 About Us 
 
 

 
 
 Alumni 

 
 Meet The Team 

 
 For Professionals 

 
 Luxury Drug Rehab 

 

 Testimonials 

 Admissions 
 
 

 
 
 Admission FAQ 

 
 Guidelines for Admission 

 
 Paying with insurance 

 
 Pre Arrival Checklist 

 
 Pre assessment 

 

 

 
 
 
 800-582-0709 
 Call Us 
 
 
 
 Help 
 Help is Waiting 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 Menu 
 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 Admissions
 

 

 
 

Admissions Overview

 

Surrounded by the spectacular Rocky Mountains, Cirque Lodge combines behavioral therapy , experiential therapy , and support programs to help you rediscover what you love in life and guide you to lifelong recovery.

If you or your loved one is suffering from a drug or alcohol addiction, please contact us as soon as possible. Our compassionate admissions team is here to help guide you through the rehab admission process and answer any questions you might have.

 
 
 
 
 
Take these simple steps to begin the journey to recovery and freedom from addiction.

 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 

Receive the Help You Deserve

At Cirque Lodge, we make your journey to our addiction center as easy and relaxing as possible. Our staff will help you navigate through the admission process. Once you decide on an admission date and fly into our local airport, our staff will handle your transportation to our facility.

Once you arrive at our facility, we will make sure you are comfortable and have everything you need. When you are ready, our medically trained professionals will guide you through the start of your addiction treatment program.

For information on what to bring with you to the center, please give us a call or read through the Pre-Arrival Checklist and What to Bring Guide here.

 What To Bring 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 

Take a Confidential Assessment

One of our professionals will take you through a confidential assessment to understand what kind of treatment program you need. Our conversation will be simple, relaxed, and entirely confidential.

We can answer any questions you may have about our drug and alcohol rehab, medically supervised detox and our dual diagnosis program. We can discuss which of our world-class treatment facilities will work best for you.

If needed, we will direct you to other resources to help and support you in your recovery.

 Confidential Assessment 

 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 

Contact Our Admissions Team

When you or a loved one struggles with an alcohol or drug addiction, making the first phone call to ask for help is often the most challenging part of recovery.

At Cirque Lodge, we make this step as easy and comfortable for you as possible. Our admissions counselors are compassionate, experienced, and non-judgmental.

We understand the anxiety and worry you may be experiencing. We are here to help ease your fears, answer your questions, and start your journey to lifelong recovery.

If you call for a loved one, we will provide advice and support on how you can help them begin their healing process.

Please contact our admissions team by calling 800-582-0709 or filling in our online form.

 Contact Us 

 

Admissions Assessment

In the past few decades, scientists and medical professionals have done extensive research into the science of addiction. Psychologists, therapists, neuroscientists, and addiction specialists have explored the causes of addiction and the best treatment methods.

We use mental and physical assessments to gain a comprehensive understanding of your addiction and design the most effective treatment plan for you. At Cirque Lodge, our medical professionals can use this insight to offer the most accurate and up-to-date treatment available.

Confidential and Compassionate

We understand that talking about your addiction can be difficult, especially in the first stages of recovery. We can assure you that our assessments are conducted with compassion and without judgment. We want to make the process as easy as possible for you.

Any information you share will be kept entirely confidential.

 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 

Mental Assessment

At Cirque Lodge, we provide a range of mental assessments to gain the best possible insight into your addiction. These include:

 

Psychological testing

Neuropsychological testing

Cognitive testing

Personality testing

 

 

Psychological Testing

The purpose of psychological testing is to identify any co-occurring disorders you have that may contribute to your addiction. These may include depression, anxiety, and panic disorders.

While neuropsychological testing focuses specifically on the effect drug abuse has had on your brain, psychological testing gives a broader overview of emotional or behavioral disorders.

While neuropsychological testing focuses specifically on the effect drug abuse has had on your brain, psychological testing gives a broader overview of emotional or behavioral disorders.

At Cirque Lodge, we use a variety of different psychological tests in our assessments. These include:

 

Structured clinical interview for DSM-V

Personality Assessment Inventory

Mini-International Neuropsychiatric Interview

Millon Clinical Multiaxial Inventory-III

Minnesota Multiphasic Personality Inventory (MMPI)

 

Diagnosing co-occurring disorders is an essential part of our assessment process. SAMSHA’s research finds that almost half of people with a substance use disorder have a co-occurring disorder.

Co-occurring disorders are often the underlying cause of substance use. If left untreated, the same patterns may re-trigger substance abuse and addiction even after an initial recovery.

At Cirque Lodge, we treat co-occurring disorders in our dual diagnosis program. This provides you with a complete healing process where you recover from the disorders that underlie your addiction. Diagnosis through psychological testing is the first stage of this process.

Psychological testing also helps us identify and address interpersonal and intrapersonal issues that could affect your recovery.

Addiction Assessment

Addiction testing assesses the extent of your addiction to drugs or alcohol. We will ask you how many units you are drinking or how many drugs you are using. This helps us to design the most effective treatment plan for you.

We also review your existing prescriptions and diagnoses to offer the appropriate level of care throughout your time at the center. This information is particularly important for your treatment during the detoxification process.

Neuropsychological Testing

Neuropsychological testing assesses the effect drug use has had on your brain. It informs us which mental skills your addiction has impacted the most and which ones may still function well.

During the assessment, a team member will ask you to answer several questions verbally and repeat specific sentences or phrases back to them. They will also give you a sheet of written questions to answer. We may also ask you to move around or perform specific actions in a particular order.

The results of these tests will give us in-depth information about your mental skills, including:

 

Cognition and emotional health

Executive functioning

Working memory function

Attention

Language skills

Motor coordination

Memory

 

Our analysts then compare your results to other people who have a similar background and history to yourself. This gives us a clearer picture of the extent to which your addiction has affected your brain. We use this information to design the most accurate and beneficial treatment plan for you.

Physical Health Assessment

During physical health assessments, we measure the physical effects of drug abuse and addiction on your body. We test for certain diseases that may have resulted from the addiction. The National Institute of Drug Abuse lists physical testing as a principle of effective treatment.

Our standard tests include:

 

Hepatitis C and HIV blood tests

Liver function test

 

Physical testing allows us to pinpoint any physical conditions that might require treatment during your time at Cirque Lodge or afterward. Our team will incorporate this into your inpatient treatment and aftercare programs.

 
 

 

 
 
 
 

 

 

 
 

 
Have any questions?

 

 
 
Please enable JavaScript in your browser to complete this form.

 Name * 

 Phone * 

 Email * 

 Preferred contact Preferred contact Email Phone 

 Message * 

 URL 

 
 

 SUBMIT 
 
 
 

 

 

 
 

 
 
 
 

 (800) 582-0709 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 

 info@cirquelodge.com 
 
 

 

 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 The Lodge 
 3114 E Ida's Rd, Sundance, UT 84604 
 
 

 

 

 
 
 
 

 
 The Studio 
 777 N Palisade Dr, Orem, UT 84097 
 
 

 

 
 

 

 
 
 

 
 Opening Hours 
 24 Hours 
 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 

 

 
Phone

 
(800) 582-0709

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
Email

 
info@cirquelodge.com

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
Address

 
777 N Palisade Drive

Orem, UT 84097

 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 

 

 
Opening Hours

 
24 Hours

 
 
 
-->
 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 

 
A Safe Place to Heal and Recover

 

Our individualized treatment programs offer an enriching rehabilitation experience tailored to suit your needs. The breathtaking mountains surrounding our center are the perfect place to heal. Our magnificent location offers unique opportunities to reconnect with your true self and rediscover your love of life.

 

 
 More About Us 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 
About Cirque Lodge

 

 
Cirque Lodge is a recovery retreat providing cognitive and experiential therapies, in the pristine natural beauty of Utah’s Rocky Mountains.

 
Cirque Lodge is considered among our colleagues, as one of, if not the premium drug and alcohol rehab facility in the country.

 

 

 

 

 
 

 
 

 
 
 
 

 (800) 582-0709 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 

 info@cirquelodge.com 
 
 

 

 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 The Lodge 
 3114 E Ida's Rd, Sundance, UT 84604 
 
 

 

 

 
 
 
 

 
 The Studio 
 777 N Palisade Dr, Orem, UT 84097

 Sitemap 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 
 
 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 

 

 
 

 

 
 

 

 

 
Recovery, It’s In Our Nature!

 
We support patients from all over the USA. For example, from: 
 Salt Lake City ,

<script id='script-67bdc57539a1a-js' type='text/javascript'>
var option_button_pdf = {
    source:'https://www.cirquelodge.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/02/Brochure-for-Website-compressed-1-1-1-1.pdf',
    webgl:true,
};

function loadDFlipAssets() {
    // Add CSS file
    const link = document.createElement("link");
    link.rel = "stylesheet";
    link.href = "https://www.cirquelodge.com/wp-content/themes/bv-theme/assets/dist/css/components/dflip.min.css";
    document.head.appendChild(link);

    // Add JS file
    const script = document.createElement("script");
    script.src = "https://www.cirquelodge.com/wp-content/themes/bv-theme/assets/dist/js/components/dflip.min.js";
    script.addEventListener('load', () => {
        setTimeout(() => {
            document.querySelector('.dear-flip a').classList.remove('loading');
            document.querySelector('.dear-flip a').click();
        }, 2500);
    });
    document.body.appendChild(script);
}
if (document.querySelector('.dear-flip a'))
document.querySelector('.dear-flip a').addEventListener('click', (e) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    document.querySelector('.dear-flip a').setAttribute('href', '#');
    document.querySelector('.dear-flip a').classList.add('loading');
    document.querySelector('.dear-flip a').classList.add('_df_button');
    document.querySelector('.dear-flip a').setAttribute('id', 'button_pdf')
    loadDFlipAssets();
}, { once: true })

window.addEventListener('load', () => {
    if (window.location.hash.startsWith('#button_pdf')) {
        const link = document.querySelector('.dear-flip a');
        if (link) {
            link.setAttribute('href', '#');
            link.classList.add('loading');
            link.classList.add('_df_button');
            link.setAttribute('id', 'button_pdf');
            loadDFlipAssets();
        }
    }
});
</script>

About Cirque Lodge

 

 
Cirque Lodge is a recovery retreat providing cognitive and experiential therapies, in the pristine natural beauty of Utah’s Rocky Mountains.

 
Cirque Lodge is considered among our colleagues, as one of, if not the premium drug and alcohol rehab facility in the country.

 

 

 

 

 
 

 
 

 
 
 
 

 (800) 582-0709 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 

 info@cirquelodge.com

 3114 E Ida's Rd, Sundance, UT 84604

 777 N Palisade Dr, Orem, UT 84097

<script id='script-67bdc57539a1a-js' type='text/javascript'>
var option_button_pdf = {
    source:'https://www.cirquelodge.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/02/Brochure-for-Website-compressed-1-1-1-1.pdf',
    webgl:true,
};

function loadDFlipAssets() {
    // Add CSS file
    const link = document.createElement("link");
    link.rel = "stylesheet";
    link.href = "https://www.cirquelodge.com/wp-content/themes/bv-theme/assets/dist/css/components/dflip.min.css";
    document.head.appendChild(link);

    // Add JS file
    const script = document.createElement("script");
    script.src = "https://www.cirquelodge.com/wp-content/themes/bv-theme/assets/dist/js/components/dflip.min.js";
    script.addEventListener('load', () => {
        setTimeout(() => {
            document.querySelector('.dear-flip a').classList.remove('loading');
            document.querySelector('.dear-flip a').click();
        }, 2500);
    });
    document.body.appendChild(script);
}
if (document.querySelector('.dear-flip a'))
document.querySelector('.dear-flip a').addEventListener('click', (e) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    document.querySelector('.dear-flip a').setAttribute('href', '#');
    document.querySelector('.dear-flip a').classList.add('loading');
    document.querySelector('.dear-flip a').classList.add('_df_button');
    document.querySelector('.dear-flip a').setAttribute('id', 'button_pdf')
    loadDFlipAssets();
}, { once: true })

window.addEventListener('load', () => {
    if (window.location.hash.startsWith('#button_pdf')) {
        const link = document.querySelector('.dear-flip a');
        if (link) {
            link.setAttribute('href', '#');
            link.classList.add('loading');
            link.classList.add('_df_button');
            link.setAttribute('id', 'button_pdf');
            loadDFlipAssets();
        }
    }
});
</script>

About Cirque Lodge

 

 
Cirque Lodge is a recovery retreat providing cognitive and experiential therapies, in the pristine natural beauty of Utah’s Rocky Mountains.

 
Cirque Lodge is considered among our colleagues, as one of, if not the premium drug and alcohol rehab facility in the country.

 

 

 

 

 
 

 
 

 
 
 
 

 (800) 582-0709 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 

 info@cirquelodge.com

rawMentions: MOUNTAIN LUXURY RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT: HOME AWAY FROM HOME
Cirque Lodge offers residential rehabilitation programs for drug and alcohol abuse as well as other addiction recovery services.
Our residential program is an enriching experience that nurtures personal development.
WHO WE TREAT: Cirque Lodge offers residential rehabilitation programs for drug and alcohol abuse and addiction.
Our inpatient treatment program offers state-of-the-art rehab facilities (Cirque Lodge & Cirque Lodge Studio), combined with mental health services in the perfect location for healing.
We offer private inpatient detox facilities with twenty-four-hour supervision to allow a comfortable process.
Our inpatient treatment program combines various treatment approaches to provide you with a holistic recovery experience.
At Cirque Lodge, our inpatient rehab facility treatment utilizes dual diagnosis treatment to assess the cause and nature of your addiction.
“Residential treatment needs to be effective, attractive, active, and enlightened, but most importantly it needs to be connected and continued with the community at large.
The 12-steps of Alcoholics Anonymous underpin our residential treatment program.
Our expert staff draws upon extensive scientific research and personal experience to provide the most advanced and up-to-date inpatient treatment experience.
Our team will incorporate this into your inpatient treatment and aftercare programs.

rawMentions: Dual Diagnosis
REHAB & DUAL DIAGNOSIS
At Cirque Lodge, our inpatient rehab facility treatment utilizes dual diagnosis treatment to assess the cause and nature of your addiction.
We offer integrated programs that include dual diagnosis as part of our drug addiction treatment as we evaluate both issues with a focus on recovery.
Cirque Lodge is a trauma-informed substance use disorder treatment center that specializes in co-occurring mental health issues.
Underlying mental illnesses and co-occurring disorders can be the driving force behind substance addiction.
Addiction is often the result of co-occurring disorders.
Many people who struggle with an addiction also have a co-occurring disorder or another underlying mental health condition.
Co-occurring disorders are often the driving force behind addiction.
We can answer any questions you may have about our drug and alcohol rehab, medically supervised detox and our dual diagnosis program.
At Cirque Lodge, we treat co-occurring disorders in our dual diagnosis program.
The purpose of psychological testing is to identify any co-occurring disorders you have that may contribute to your addiction.
Diagnosing co-occurring disorders is an essential part of our assessment process.
SAMSHA’s research finds that almost half of people with a substance use disorder have a co-occurring disorder.
Co-occurring disorders are often the underlying cause of substance use.
